Inter-recipe dependency: simmer_stock must finish before cook_risotto starts.

Resource capacities:
- prep_area: can run up to 2 tasks concurrently.
- oven: 1 task (preheat_oven or bake_chicken) at a time.
- stove: 1 task at a time.
